headline: Public Storage And JPMorgan Preferreds Pair Trade Idea
summary: Spot a preferred stock mispricing: PSA.PR.H yields more than JPM.PR.C despite better credit. Read the full analysis here.

headline: UBS Maintains Neutral on Public Storage, Raises Price Target to $314
summary: UBS  analyst Michael Goldsmith   maintains Public Storage (NYSE:PSA) with a Neutral and raises the price target from $276 to $314.
